criteria.name: no_platform_in_frontmatter
criteria.description: Feature YAML frontmatter does not contain a 'platform' field

criteria.name: no_framework_references
criteria.description: Feature body contains no framework-specific component names (React, Flutter, Drawer, BottomSheet, etc.)

criteria.name: interface_requirements
criteria.description: Feature includes an 'Interface Requirements' section describing data and layout logically without framework references

criteria.name: acceptance_criteria_independent
criteria.description: Given-When-Then acceptance criteria use functional language, not framework-specific language

criteria.name: exhaustive_constraints
criteria.description: Every schema node's type, units, defaults, when/must clauses are documented — no constraint detail lost

criteria.name: source_references
criteria.description: Each feature file includes Source References with links to structural schema and normative text
